name: arc
description: ARC — Agent Remote Control. Universal remote control for AI agent frameworks.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/protocol && npm run build --workspace=packages/adapter-deepagent --workspace=packages/adapter-hermes --workspace=packages/adapter-openclaw --workspace=packages/cli --workspace=packages/web-client
scripts.lint: eslint packages/*/src/ && ruff check relay/ tests/
scripts.test:ts: npm run test:protocol && npm run test --workspace=packages/web-client
scripts.test:py: npm run test:relay && npm run test:plugin && npm run test:contracts && npm run test:websocket
scripts.test: npm run test:ts && npm run test:py
